brewery_name: Brick by Brick (Raudonų Plytų Alaus Dirbtuvės)

comment: Brilliant color with a sweet bite to it. Very good cidre all around with solid balance.
Very big bubbles and corb sweet. Fun find however and glad to have tried.
brewery_name: Brick by Brick (Raudonų Plytų Alaus Dirbtuvės)

comment: Old school or maybe just old. Leathery, tobacco and over the top(s) for my preference. Solid cherry flavor though.
Very smooth and enjoyable. Sweet but not overly so and the grapes work very well. Goes down very easily.
Delicious and very approachable. Done well and less sweet than expected which is very nice too. Worth a try.
Bright and crisp with large bubbles.
